content:
Write a single self-contained HTML file at ./architecture.html that diagrams a 3-tier
system: a Client box connected to an API box, connected to a Database box. Label the boxes
exactly "Client", "API", and "Database", and draw the connections with inline <svg> (lines
or arrows) — no external stylesheets, scripts, or CDN links.

message.content:
Write a single self-contained HTML file at ./architecture.html that diagrams a 3-tier
system: a Client box connected to an API box, connected to a Database box. Label the boxes
exactly "Client", "API", and "Database", and draw the connections with inline <svg> (lines
or arrows) — no external stylesheets, scripts, or CDN links.

content.text: I'll create a self-contained HTML file with an SVG diagram showing the 3-tier architecture.

input.content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>3-Tier Architecture Diagram</title>
<style>
  body {
    font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
    background: #f5f5f5;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    height: 100vh;
    margin: 0;
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<svg width="760" height="220" viewBox="0 0 760 220" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="10" refX="8" refY="3" orient="auto" markerUnits="strokeWidth">
      <path d="M0,0 L8,3 L0,6 Z" fill="#333" />
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Connections -->
  <line x1="200" y1="110" x2="280" y2="110" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" />
  <line x1="480" y1="110" x2="560" y2="110" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" />

  <!-- Client box -->
  <rect x="40" y="60" width="160" height="100" rx="8" fill="#dbeafe" stroke="#2563eb" stroke-width="2" />
  <text x="120" y="115" font-size="20" text-anchor="middle" fill="#1e3a8a" font-weight="bold">Client</text>

  <!-- API box -->
  <rect x="300" y="60" width="160" height="100" rx="8" fill="#dcfce7" stroke="#16a34a" stroke-width="2" />
  <text x="380" y="115" font-size="20" text-anchor="middle" fill="#14532d" font-weight="bold">API</text>

  <!-- Database box -->
  <rect x="560" y="60" width="160" height="100" rx="8" fill="#fef3c7" stroke="#d97706" stroke-width="2" />
  <text x="640" y="115" font-size="20" text-anchor="middle" fill="#78350f" font-weight="bold">Database</text>
</svg>
</body>
</html>

content.content: File created successfully at: /Users/boeschj/Documents/GitHub/parchment/bench/.runs/2026-07-12T15-07-38-053Z/architecture-diagram/html/rep-2/architecture.html (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

toolUseResult.content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>3-Tier Architecture Diagram</title>
<style>
  body {
    font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
    background: #f5f5f5;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    height: 100vh;
    margin: 0;
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<svg width="760" height="220" viewBox="0 0 760 220" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="10" refX="8" refY="3" orient="auto" markerUnits="strokeWidth">
      <path d="M0,0 L8,3 L0,6 Z" fill="#333" />
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Connections -->
  <line x1="200" y1="110" x2="280" y2="110" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" />
  <line x1="480" y1="110" x2="560" y2="110" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" />

  <!-- Client box -->
  <rect x="40" y="60" width="160" height="100" rx="8" fill="#dbeafe" stroke="#2563eb" stroke-width="2" />
  <text x="120" y="115" font-size="20" text-anchor="middle" fill="#1e3a8a" font-weight="bold">Client</text>

  <!-- API box -->
  <rect x="300" y="60" width="160" height="100" rx="8" fill="#dcfce7" stroke="#16a34a" stroke-width="2" />
  <text x="380" y="115" font-size="20" text-anchor="middle" fill="#14532d" font-weight="bold">API</text>

  <!-- Database box -->
  <rect x="560" y="60" width="160" height="100" rx="8" fill="#fef3c7" stroke="#d97706" stroke-width="2" />
  <text x="640" y="115" font-size="20" text-anchor="middle" fill="#78350f" font-weight="bold">Database</text>
</svg>
</body>
</html>

content.text: Created `architecture.html` — a self-contained file with an inline SVG showing Client → API → Database boxes connected by arrows, no external resources.
